prompt_text: Help Scout vs Zendesk pricing and features
response:
# Help Scout vs Zendesk: Pricing & Features Comparison

## Pricing Overview

| Aspect | Help Scout | Zendesk |
|--------|-----------|---------|
| **Starting Price** | $20/user/month | $19/agent/month |
| **Free Plan** | Yes (limited) | Yes (limited) |
| **Pricing Model** | Per user | Per agent |
| **Scalability** | Better for small-medium | Better for enterprise |

## Key Features Comparison

### Help Scout Strengths ✓
- **Ease of use** - Simpler, more intuitive interface
- **Better for small teams** - Cleaner, less bloated
- **Email-first approach** - Natural email workflow
- **Onboarding** - Faster setup and learning curve
- **Customer satisfaction** - Known for responsive support
- **Lower cost** - Generally cheaper at small scales
- **Built-in features** - Knowledge base, forms included in base plans

### Zendesk Strengths ✓
- **Advanced automation** - More sophisticated workflows
- **Customization** - Highly flexible and configurable
- **Omnichannel** - Better multi-channel integration
- **Scalability** - Superior for large enterprises
- **Third-party integrations** - Extensive app marketplace
- **Reporting & analytics** - More detailed insights
- **Global support** - Better for international teams

## Feature Breakdown

| Feature | Help Scout | Zendesk |
|---------|-----------|---------|
| Live Chat | ✓ | ✓ |
| Knowledge Base | ✓ | ✓ |
| Customer Surveys | ✓ | ✓ |
| Team Collaboration | ✓ | ✓ |
| Mobile App | ✓ | ✓ |
| **AI/Automation** | Basic | Advanced |
| **Custom Fields** | Limited | Extensive |
| **API/Webhooks** | ✓ | ✓ |

## Best For

**Choose Help Scout if:**
- Small-to-medium business (under 50 agents)
- Primarily email support
- Want simple, intuitive platform
- Budget-conscious
- Need quick implementation

**Choose Zendesk if:**
- Large enterprise (100+ agents)
- Omnichannel support needed
- Need advanced automation
- Heavy customization required
- Global operations with complex requirements

## Cost Scenario Example

**For 10 agents/month:**
- **Help Scout**: ~$200-400 (depending on plan)
- **Zendesk**: ~$190-600+ (depending on add-ons)

---

**Bottom line**: Help Scout = simplicity & value. Zendesk = power & flexibility. Your choice depends on team size and complexity needs.
